productDisplayName: Fila Men Smash III Black Sports Shoes
description: Enjoy great days out in these slip-on shoes from fila. Smash III, with its mesh upper and slip-on technique, offers great comfort and Fit. Team these shoes with your Sports kit, or for a casual style they'll look great with a tee and denims. Upper Meshed upper for maximum ventilation and durability Stitch detailing in ridges for durability, added structure to the upper and midfoot support Reinforced heel cup for extra support to the back foot Reinforced toe box for durability and added protection to the forefoot Slip-on system for easy wear Cut-out at the midfoot for easy wear Brand name on the side and tongue for style Midsole EVA midsole for lightweight comfort and better shock absorption Cushioned EVA foam footbed for enhanced impact protection and comfort Removable sockliner to replace with a medical orthotic Outsole Outsole with multi-directional pattern for superior grip Flex grooves for greater flexibility of the feet Protruding lugs for grip on all terrains shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a dryer Avoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in sunlight
